overview: TaskFlow is a private todo list app with Internet Identity login. Each user has their own isolated task list — add, complete, edit, and delete tasks that persist permanently. Features a modern dark-mode UI that works on mobile and desktop.
features: Internet Identity login — no passwords needed
Private per-user task list with full isolation
Add, complete, edit, and delete tasks
Dark mode toggle with preference saved
Fully responsive on mobile and desktop
Clean modern UI with smooth transitions
Empty state and loading states handled gracefully
